question: Will Anthropic make Claude Mythos broadly available before July 1, 2026?
reason: Anthropic has not announced plans to make Claude Mythos broadly available before July 1, 2026.
evidence: Anthropic's April 2026 announcement of Claude Mythos Preview indicates limited access, with no mention of broad availability plans. ([arstechnica.com](https://arstechnica.com/ai/2026/04/why-anthropic-sent-its-claude-ai-to-an-actual-psychiatrist/?utm_source=openai))

The May 2026 update on Project Glasswing highlights the use of Claude Mythos Preview by select partners, without indicating a broader release. ([anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/research/glasswing-initial-update?vid=87&utm_source=openai))
